que: What is the main purpose of integration tests in Flutter?
options: To verify larger user flows across multiple parts of the app

que: How do integration tests compare to widget tests?
options: They are broader and test more complete user flows
They only test a single widget in isolation
They can never interact with navigation
They replace all manual QA automatically

que: What is pumpAndSettle commonly used for in integration tests?
options: To wait for animations and async UI to finish settling

que: Which is a good candidate for an integration test?
options: A full sign-in and navigation flow
A single private helper function only

que: What should integration tests usually focus on?
Which practice should you avoid with integration tests?
options: Writing one giant test for too many unrelated behaviors
They can catch flow-level regressions across screens and systems
They remove the need for all other testing
They work only without user interaction
